introduction: I am a developer and cross-sector technology professional with many years of experience spanning investment management, pharmaceutical support, e-invoicing, healthcare applications, automotive engineering environments, postal services and personal e-commerce delivery.
evidence: My strongest pattern is turning complex operational pressure into clear, reliable execution. I combine application support, software development, SQL investigation, Python automation, AI-assisted coding, release discipline, stakeholder communication and practical product thinking to keep important workflows moving, improve them over time and deliver results consistently.
highlights: Master's Degree in E-Management, graduated with Honours and full academic excellence
Academic scholarship record across Master's and Bachelor's studies
Built and ran Neutron.bg as a Django e-commerce side-hustle project
Work daily with AI tools and coding agents to accelerate development, analysis and delivery
Experience across finance, healthcare, pharmaceuticals, engineering, government services and SaaS

focusAreas.title: Developer Mindset
focusAreas.description: I work like a modern developer: using AI agents, structured analysis, code, tests and documentation to move faster while keeping the work understandable and reliable.
bullets: AI-assisted coding, review and documentation workflows
Python, SQL and practical automation for business problems

focusAreas.title: Data And Automation
focusAreas.description: I use SQL, Python, scripting, AI-assisted analysis and reporting habits to investigate issues, validate changes, reduce repetitive work and create better operational visibility.
bullets: Python automation, monitoring and reporting improvements

focusAreas.title: Builder Mindset
focusAreas.tagline: From support insight to product execution
focusAreas.description: My Neutron.bg side-hustle gave me hands-on ownership of a Django e-commerce product I built and ran, from catalog and checkout flows to admin workflows, deployment thinking and supplier-integration patterns.
bullets: Checkout, order lifecycle and supplier workflow design
